core/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava (e.g., 18.0) do not support Java 21 and may cause runtime errors or compilation issues due to internal API changes.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 14+ serialization field rules.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate the serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 14+ serialization field validation.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' field is not a valid serialization field without @Serial annotation in Java 14+.
